title: Fix: Null byte injection vulnerability
original_text: Fixed null byte injection vulnerability in file operations. Implemented null byte sanitization. Added input validation for file paths. Implemented null byte detection. Added safe file handling. Result: null byte injection vulnerability fixed.
expected_subject: fix(security): fix null byte injection vulnerability
expected_body_lines: - Add input validation for file paths
- Validation: null byte injection vulnerability fixed
expected_command: git commit -m "fix(security): fix null byte injection vulnerability"
